name: Google Workspace Accounts Never Used (90 days)
description: Detects active Google Workspace accounts older than 90 days that have never logged in.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.creation_time AS created_at FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND u.last_login_time IS NULL AND u.creation_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
remediation: Remove or disable never-used accounts and fix any over-provisioning in onboarding workflows.
